name: River City Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: River City Pawn & Jewelry operates three Texas locations offering pawn loans, jewelry sales, coins, and merchandise with over 30 years of combined experience and interest-free layaway options.
description_long:
River City Pawn & Jewelry is a locally owned pawn shop chain headquartered in Schertz, TX with three convenient locations across the greater San Antonio and Houston areas. The company was established in 2016 but leverages over 30 years of collective expertise from its team members in the pawn and jewelry business. The business positions itself as a neighborhood financial service provider that combines traditional pawn lending with retail resale operations.

The company offers a comprehensive range of services including collateral-based pawn loans, outright purchase and sale of items, and specialized services in jewelry, coins, and general merchandise. They provide interest-free layaway with 10% down on any store item, pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables, coin and numismatic services for collectors, and a constantly rotating inventory of pre-owned merchandise including sporting goods, tools, and electronics. In-store pickup is available for customer convenience.

River City Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through its emphasis on fair pricing and competitive rates, same-business-day response commitments, and its status as a locally owned operation with deep community ties. The company maintains consistent operating hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Saturday, closed Sundays) across all three locations and actively solicits customer reviews, maintaining a 4.2-star rating across 196 reviews. Their marketing emphasizes transparent, hassle-free processes and expert appraisal services.

As a pawn shop, the company's primary function is short-term collateral-based lending and resale of personal items. Consumers should understand that pawn loans involve interest charges (specific rates not disclosed on the website), require surrendering physical collateral, and have redemption deadlines. The company's 2016 founding date contradicts the marketing claim of "over 30 years of experience," though this likely refers to team member experience rather than the business itself. This is a legitimate pawn operation suitable for those needing quick, confidential loans against tangible assets.
address: 1302 S WW White Rd, San Antonio, TX 78220

company_info.headquarters: 1302 S WW White Rd, San Antonio, TX 78220

pros: Interest-free layaway available on any item with only 10% down payment
Three convenient locations in Schertz, San Antonio, and Missouri City, TX
Same-business-day response commitment on customer inquiries
In-store pickup option for customer convenience
Specialized services for coin collectors with expert identification and appraisal
Wide inventory range including jewelry, coins, electronics, musical instruments, tools, and sporting goods
4.2-star rating based on 196 verified customer reviews
cons: Specific interest rates and APRs for pawn loans not disclosed on website
Pawn loan redemption deadlines and terms not detailed online
Marketing claims 'over 30 years experience' but company founded only in 2016 (refers to staff experience only)
Limited transparency about fees, late payment policies, or item forfeiture procedures
Sunday hours not available, limiting access for weekend shoppers
best_for: Collectors seeking to buy or sell coins and numismatic items with expert appraisal
Consumers needing quick, short-term loans against jewelry, electronics, or valuables without credit checks
Budget-conscious shoppers looking for discounted pre-owned merchandise and vintage jewelry
People who prefer interest-free installment purchasing through their layaway program
diagnosis: River City Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers with tangible assets (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need fast, confidential short-term loans without credit checks, or collectors and bargain hunters seeking discounted pre-owned merchandise. The critical caveat is that pawn loans involve surrendering physical collateral, accruing interest, and having fixed redemption deadlines—the website lacks transparency on specific rates, terms, and consequences of non-redemption, requiring callers to clarify these details before borrowing.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and valuables
Direct purchase and outright sale of used items
Coin and numismatic appraisal, buying, and selling services
Jewelry sales including engagement rings, vintage pieces, and contemporary designs
Interest-free layaway with 10% down on any store item
Pre-owned merchandise inventory (electronics, tools, sporting goods, musical instruments)
In-store pickup for online or phone purchases
Expert item identification and appraisal services
Customer request callbacks and same-business-day responses
